title: PARLIAMENT QUESTION: TECHNOLOGY TRANSLATION RESEARCH PARKS (TTRP)
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Science & Technology

PARLIAMENT QUESTION: TECHNOLOGY TRANSLATION RESEARCH PARKS (TTRP)

Posted On:
18 MAR 2026 3:53PM by PIB Delhi

Under the National Mission on Interdisciplinary Cyber-Physical Systems (NM-ICPS), the Department of Science and Technology (DST) has supported four (04) Technology Translation Research Parks (TTRPs) in 2025.
Details of these TTRPs are as follows:

S. No

Name of TTRP

Host Institute (HI)

Focus Area of the TTRP

1

I-HUB for Robotics and Autonomous Systems Innovation Foundation

IISc Bengaluru

Robotics & AI Systems

2

IHUB NTIHAC Foundation

IIT Kanpur

Cybersecurity

3

Technology Innovation in Exploration & Mining Foundation

IIT (ISM) Dhanbad

Mining (Exploration to Beneficiation of Minerals)

4

IITI Drishti CPS Foundation

IIT Indore

Digital Healthcare



For the financial year 2025-26, details of funds allocated and utilised by the TTRPs are given below:

S. No.

Name of TTRP

Allocated

(amount in crores)

Utilised

(amount in crores)

1

I-HUB for Robotics and Autonomous Systems Innovation Foundation, IISc Bangalore

60

44.17

2

IHUB NTIHAC Foundation, IIT Kanpur

32.5

29.86

3

Technology Innovation in Exploration & Mining Foundation, IIT (ISM) Dhanbad

43.43

14.01

4

IITI Drishti CPS Foundation, IIT Indore

40.15

24.03



A total of 98 major research projects are being undertaken by the TTRPs. The TTRP-wise number of projects is as follows:

I-HUB for Robotics and Autonomous Systems Innovation Foundation: 08 projects

IHUB NTIHAC Foundation: 56 projects

Technology Innovation in Exploration & Mining Foundation: 07 projects

IITI Drishti CPS Foundation: 27 projects

The details of these research projects are provided in Annexure-I.



Out of 98 projects mentioned in part (c) above, 10 projects have resulted in development of technologies/ technology products. The institution-wise status of commercialisation and application of the emerging technologies supported through such projects in the country is as follows:

I-HUB for Robotics and Autonomous Systems Innovation Foundation: 03

IHUB NTIHAC Foundation: 01

Technology Innovation in Exploration & Mining Foundation: 01

IITI Drishti CPS Foundation: 05

In Andhra Pradesh, IITI DRISHTI CPS Foundation, IIT Indore has supported the project “OASIS: Online Aerial Image-based Surface Information System” in collaboration with the Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing (IIITDM) Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh. The project has developed a semi-supervised semantic segmentation model for real-time drone-based object detection and classification. The technology is commercialised through the start-up Bhoodrishti Pvt. Ltd., with application in sectors such as smart cities, defence, and border surveillance.



Selection of institutions under TTRP initiative was done following a comprehensive review of the Technology Innovation Hubs (TIHs) under NM-ICPS during FY 2024-25, to assess their progress, outcomes, and readiness for long-term sustainability by a Third-Party Evaluation (TPE) Committee constituted for the purpose. Based on the outcomes of this evaluation, the top performing TIHs were invited to submit proposals for establishing TTRPs. The proposals were subsequently examined by the Scientific Advisory Committee (SAC) against criteria such as alignment with national priorities and NM-ICPS objectives, financial sustainability and operational roadmap, existing industry collaborations and commercialisation potential, capability to build a broad cyber-physical systems (CPS) research and skilling ecosystem, and synergy with existing TIH infrastructure and resources. Based on the SAC’s recommendations, the Mission Governing Board (MGB) approved the establishment of the TTRPs as detailed in part (a) above.

The TTRPs are encouraged to further strengthen translational research, technology development and industry engagement in their respective focus areas, while expanding activities related to technology validation, prototyping and sector-specific applications. These efforts facilitate wider adoption of CPS technologies and support their deployment for public and societal use, leveraging the existing TIH ecosystem.

This information was given by the
Minister of State (Independent charge) for the Ministry of Science and Technology & Earth Sciences Dr. Jitendra Singh
in a written reply in the Lok Sabha today.

******

NKR/FT/AK/NM



Annexure-I



List of the major research projects being undertaken by the TTPRs under NM-ICPS



I-HUB for Robotics and Autonomous Systems Innovation Foundation, IISc Bengaluru: Focus area- Robotics & AI Systems

Development of Autonomous Drones and VTOL UAV Systems for Demanding Environments

Automated Fleet Management and Charging Systems for UAVs

High-Performance Actuators and Modular Robotic Manipulators

Collaborative Robotic Systems for Adaptive Physical Rehabilitation

High-Precision AI-Enhanced Autonomous Navigation Modules

Frontline Health Worker Assistant

Intelligent Dengue Surveillance in Action

AI-powered Impact-based heat stress forecasting



IHUB NTIHAC Foundation, IIT Kanpur: focus area- Cybersecurity

Real-time Intelligent System Design for Secure Digital Communication

Cloud based Smart Video Surveillance System with Application Layer Cyber Physical Systems Security

Reliable and Privacy Preserving Data Auditing for FOG assisted Cyber Physical Systems (FOG-CPS)

Predictor and Analyzer of Security Threats (PAST): A model-based risk analysis framework for critical interconnected infrastructures

Smart Cyber-Physical Security of Electric Powertrains in Autonomous e-Mobility Systems

Development of Cognitive Cyber Physical (C2PS) Testbed

Novel Security Framework for Internet of Drones

Design and Implementation of Secure Service and Attribute-based Authorization Model in Dynamic and Constrained-specific IoT Environment

Securing Deep Neural Networks against Adversarial Attacks in Medical Imaging

Mitigation of cyber-attacks in power systems using non-linear control system design

Design and Implementation of Lightweight Key Management Protocol for Securing Industrial Control Systems

Design and development of Cybersecured Smart Power interface for Energy - Local area network (E-LAN)

Blockchain and Microgrid: Implementation of a Peer-to-peer Energy Marketplace in India for the Average Joe

Design and Implementation of a Secure Scan Test Architecture to Counter Scan-based Side-channel Attacks

Development of Machine Learning Models Resistant to Cyber Physical Attacks

Cybersecurity of critical infrastructure: National-level Medical Grid System

Malware Analysis using Machine Learning Techniques for Industrial Control System

Bot Prevention in Cyber Physical Systems

Neuro-memristive PUF for Biometric Sensing Chip

Smart data agent for location management and privacy

A fault attack resistant crypto-accelerator for ultra-lightweight encryption protocols of GIFT family in RISC-V architecture.

Risk Averse Resilience Framework for Critical Infrastructure Security

Secure Drones: Analyze, Deploy, and Decide Cryptographic Modules in UAVs

Detecting collusion and data manipulation attacks in smart-grid networks

Synthetic Data Generation using Machine Learning Algorithms in Cyber Physical Systems

Development of a complete authentication system using printed RRAM based PUFs

Team-HackIT: A Web-Based Testbed for Multiplayer Cyber Deception Experiments

Security Enhancement of SELinux/SEAndroid Policies

Vulnerability discovery and liveness detection for improving the security in biometric authentication systems

Siegebreaker II: End-to-middle Covert Internet Communication Using Programmable Network Hardware (Deceptive Communication Strategies)

Programmable cryptosystem for 5G telecommunication networks

Internet Data over the Cellular Voice Channel -- Deceptive Communication Strategies

Verified Communication Protocol Implementation for Internet of Things

SecAI HSM- Machine Learning based malware and botnet prevention Hardware Security Module on Unmanned Aerial Vehicles

Steps towards human-centered audit process for cybersecurity audits in the safety-critical sector in India

Digital Twin-based Intrusion Detection System Using Federated Learning for IoMT

Intrusion Detection in Network Slices and Software-Defined Networking

Design and Development of Real-Time Anomalous Electrical Power Consumption Detection Tool for Critical Devices of Cyber-Physical Systems

Scalable and Adaptable Scheme for Intrusion Detection in Smart Power Networks

Design and Analysis of Multivariate Digital Signature as post-Quantum candidate in NIST

Development of AI-Enabled National Portal for Efficient Search of Missing People

A Scalable Consensus and Energy Efficient Blockchain Enabled Healthcare System

Enhancing Electric Vehicle Security- AI-Powered Detection and Prevention of Cyber Attacks

System design for an acoustic-based attack on UAV and its mitigation mechanism

A Multi-Layer Approach for Secure UAV Networks

Cyber Threat Intelligence based Advanced Persistent Threats Detection and Attribution System for Critical Infrastructure of Cyber Physical Systems

Study of NAVIC and Opti Flow based Drone Systems in GPS Denied Environment

Proactive and Generalized Deepfake Defense Mechanisms to Reinforce Cyberspace

Designing a Cybersecured LoRaWAN Framework-Enhancing Jamming Mitigation and Device Authentication

Design and Validation of Secure CAN-XL protocol IP core for Software defined Vehicles

Targeted Cryptanalysis of Multisource Encrypted Data

Design and Implementation of a Decentralized Data Auditing Platform using Algebraic Signature and Zero-Knowledge Protocol (ZKP)

Multi-Authority ABAC Framework for Secure Cross-Domain IoT Resource Sharing

Adversarial Machine Learning Analysis Framework for Medical Imaging

Cybersecurity Analysis of Networked Microgrid

Blockchain and Microgrid: Implementation of a P2P Energy Marketplace in India



III.
Technology Innovation in Exploration & Mining Foundation, IIT (ISM) Dhanbad: focus area- Mining (Exploration to Beneficiation of Minerals)

Design and development of an advanced CPS-based solutions and AI/ML/Deep learning algorithms for mineral exploration

Pathways to Net-Zero Mining: Integrating Green Energy, Autonomous Technologies and the Circular Economy in Mineral Resource Management

Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning in Mineral administration

To develop a world-class supply chain observatory for critical mineral supply chain resilience

Development of Ground-Based Synthetic Aperture Radar (GBSAR) System

Establishing the Asia-Pacific Clean Energy Supply Chain (APCESC)

Digital Mining Infrastructure for Indian Mines



IV.
IITI Drishti CPS Foundation, at IIT Indore: Focus area - Digital Healthcare

SWASTi-DT: A Digital Twin for monitoring Space Weather Effects on orbiting satellites.

Simuliware: A digital twin based low-cost shopfloor simulation solution for MSMEs

iGLU : Intelligent Glucose Measurement Device

Remote multimodal point-of-care health diagnostic and consultancy system

OASIS: Online Aerial image-based Surface Information System

UAV based Smart Spraying system for Agriculture

Generation and visualization of neural radiance field-based digital twin for autonomous vision-based SHM

Artificial intelligence enabled portable slit lamp-smart phone device for ophthalmological examination

Medication Management System

Wireless Real-Time Passenger Counting System

iHealth: IoT-Enabled Ancillary Support for Rural Health-Center

SARVAKSH Strategic, AI-Reinforced, Vectorized, Adaptive, Kinetic and Secure Haven

Development of a Cyber-Physical System for Road and Infrastructure Monitoring and Maintenance

Development of a Low-Cost Digital Instrumentation System for Angular Position Measurement of a Rotating Shaft using Tunnelling Magneto-Resistance Angle Sensor

Development of 3D holography based digital twin technology for an induction motor for predictive maintenance

E-Nose:Design and Development of an Electronic nose for Aroma analysis and Evaluation in Ayurveda

TrisEase: Physiotherapy solution for Trismus

Designing remote PPG based Heart estimation system for face mask videos

AI based virtual assistant to support primary education for rural students in regional language

AI-guided portable system for adulteration and dilution detection in Basmati rice

Agri-Genomics Data Management Platform

Development of multiwalled carbon nanotube voltage sensor using copper oxide nanofluids

Design of FBG Assisted AI Based Plantar Pressure Measuring Device For Clinical Applications

Design and Development of Wireless Flexible Electronics Nasal- WiFlen Mask for Respiratory Breathing Assessments

Continuous closed CSF Glucose Monitoring using CGM sensor in patients with External ventricular drainage for early detection of CSF Infection

Capacity Building in Cyber Physical Systems

Quality of life in cancer in Indian context: Development of digital interface for Indian Context.

*****

(Release ID: 2241762)
